PROOF OF SERVICE OF DECLARATION; SUMMONS &COMPLAINT; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; STATEMENT OF DAMAGES; LETTER; DECLARATION; LETTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORTIARTY, GERALDINE (PP) SERVED JUL-01-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & THEIR ACENC
PROOF OF SERVICE ON SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC GUARDIAN'S OFFICE BY SERVING, ZEE ROWLAND, AUTHORIZED AGENT, SERVING ON JULY 16, 2002

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEMURRER - PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. MS. MORIARTY DID NOT GIVE NOTICE OF INTENT TO ARGUE NOR DID SHE FILE ANY WRITTEN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER. THEREFORE, TENTATIVE RULING ADOAPTED -- DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER FOR JUDGE ROBERTSON'S SIGNATURE. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH CSR#5162

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Plaintiff GERALDING MORIARTY in propria persona and opposing party
* Ms. Moriarty did not give notice of intent to argue nor did she file any written opposition to defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's demurrer. Therefore, tentative ruling adoapted -- Defendant THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Demurrer: Sustained without leave to amend. Defendant to prepare order for Judge Robertson's signature. (AJR/301) Karen Farnsworth, CSR 5162
